expectations.text: Scope mode is detected as 'branch' (comparing current branch against a base branch)
expectations.evidence: scope-determination.md identifies 'Current branch: master', 'Base branch: main', and 'Effective base: commit b8a2395'. Correctly determined branch topology.

expectations.text: Changed files list is present in scope-determination.md showing files that differ between master and main
expectations.evidence: scope-determination.md contains detailed file list covering committed code (Story 0 Foundation), uncommitted code (Story 1), documentation changes, and test infrastructure with specific file paths.

expectations.text: All 6 review types are selected: standard, security, performance, architecture, test-coverage, and silent-failure
expectations.evidence: Performed a single-pass review covering multiple dimensions (code quality, security, tests, build config) but did not formally separate into 6 distinct review types with independent passes. No review-selection output was produced.

expectations.text: Subagent launch was attempted for each of the 6 selected review types
expectations.evidence: No subagents were launched. The baseline performed all review work inline as a single monolithic review pass.

expectations.text: A final report file (final-report.md) exists with review findings or a synthesis output
expectations.evidence: final-report.md exists with 5 findings, verification gate results (typecheck, tests, lint, npm audit), and an overall 'Approve with suggestions' verdict.
